raw_consumer_statement:
Date : XX/XX/year> To : Citibank Dispute Department XXXX. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, SD XXXX Subject : Formal Dispute of Duplicate Insurance Claim Charge To Whom It May Concern, I am writing to formally dispute a charge of {$3200.00} posted on XX/XX/year>, to my Citibank Visa account. The charge was made by XXXX for an insurance-related claim that was already partially paid by my insurance provider, XXXX, in the amount of {$2000.00}. XXXX issued their payment on XX/XX/year>, and XXXX cashed it on XX/XX/year>. 
Despite receiving payment from XXXX, XXXX charged my credit card for the full amount of the claim, resulting in a duplicate payment. XXXX has acknowledged this error in writing but has refused to issue a refund. Instead, they have proposed a payment plan and are actively pressuring me to sign a dispute waiver, which would relinquish my right to pursue reimbursement through proper channels. I consider this coercive and inappropriate, especially given their admission of fault. 
Furthermore, my insurer XXXX has also contacted XXXX directly to resolve the matter and has similarly been given the runaround. Their efforts to clarify and correct the duplicate payment have been met with evasive responses and no meaningful resolution.
